title: Xtra Charred Croatian Meat Skillet
description: A hearty one-pot dish featuring charred Croatian sausage and vegetables in a savory oyster sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is gluten-free friendly and features a cure for added flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast iron skillet over medium high heat.
Add the sliced Croatian sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the oyster sauce, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and cure to the skillet, stirring to combine.
Continue to cook the mixture for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sausage is charred and the vegetables are tender.
Remove the skillet from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the Xtra Charred Croatian Meat Skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
